title: Tattoo Gift Certificate Template, Dark Gothic Editable Voucher for Tattoo Studio, Printable Gift Card Canva Template
description:
Looking for a professional way to offer gift certificates at your tattoo studio? This dark luxury gothic gift certificate template will help you create stunning, branded vouchers that reflect your studio's aesthetic and drive more bookings.

✨ WHAT'S INCLUDED:
• 1 High-resolution Canva template (300 DPI)
• Dark gothic luxury design with customizable text fields
• Easy-to-edit placeholders for studio name, amount, terms, and expiry
• Print-ready format (standard gift card size)
• Instant download after purchase

🎨 HOW TO EDIT:
1. Click the Canva link provided after purchase
2. Customize text, colours, and fonts to match your brand
3. Add your studio logo and contact details
4. Download as PDF or PNG for printing
5. No design experience needed!

⚡ FEATURES:
• Professional dark gothic aesthetic
• Fully customizable in Canva (free account works)
• High-quality 300 DPI resolution for crisp printing
• Standard gift card dimensions
• Commercial use included

🎯 PERFECT FOR:
• Tattoo studios wanting to increase revenue through gift sales
• Artists offering last-minute gift options for clients
• Studios building professional brand materials
• Holiday promotions and special occasions
• Building client loyalty and referrals

❓ FAQ:
Q: Do I need Canva Pro to edit this?
A: No, this template works with free Canva accounts.

Q: Can I use this for commercial purposes?
A: Yes, commercial use is included with your purchase.

📋 PLEASE NOTE:
This is a digital download only. No physical item will be shipped. Files are available immediately after purchase.
source_why: Gift certificates are the #1 selling digital template for tattoo studios. High demand, low competition for premium dark/gothic aesthetic. Average seller price £4.99-£7.99. Buyers searching for editable, professional gift cards they can customise in Canva.
